effects.name: Magi
effects.menu_description: • Ignore <AbilityPowerText>18%</AbilityPowerText> of <AbilityPowerText>Magical Armor</AbilityPowerText>.

effects.name: Heatwave
effects.menu_description:
• Deals 15 (+0.8%) Damage each second.

Firestorm - When Heatwave damages a Target:
• Deals 6.25% more damage each second, up to 50%.
• Resets after not damaging the Target for 2.5s.

effects.name: Vital Shield
effects.menu_description:
• Block 25% of Magical Damage for 3s.
• Vital Shield returns after not taking Hero Damage for 20s.

effects.name: Razor Cleave
effects.menu_description:
• Deal (+40%) Damage around the Target.
• Damage decreases from 100% to 50% based on distance.

effects.name: Technician
effects.menu_description: • Gain (+2%) Physical Power.

effects.name: Battleborn
effects.condition: <Condition>On dealing damage to Heroes or Monsters:</Condition>
effects.menu_description:
• Increase your Ability Damage dealt by 1% for 3s.
• Stacks up to 10 times.
• Melee Heroes gain Stacks twice as fast.

effects.name: Starshroom
effects.menu_description:
• Place a bouncy Starshroom for 150s.
• Heroes at the location are immediately bounced up.
• Heroes that Jump onto the Starshroom bounce off of it.
• Each Hero can only bounce on it once every 5s.
• Disappears 12s after being bounced on.

effects.name: Visionary
effects.menu_description:
Gain Solstone.
• Increase Ward Cap from 2 to 3.

effects.name: Pacifist
effects.menu_description: Receive diminishing <GoldText>Gold</GoldText> from Minion kills.

effects.name: Veil
effects.menu_description: • Gain a <EffectText>Spell Shield</EffectText> that blocks the next Ability.

effects.name: Malefic
effects.menu_description: • Increase your <AbilityPowerText>Magical Power</AbilityPowerText> by <AbilityPowerText>15%</AbilityPowerText>.

effects.name: Unstable Shackles
effects.menu_description:
• Take 10% additional Magical Damage.
• Have their Tenacity decreased by 20%.

effects.name: Curse of Pain
effects.menu_description:
• Deal 30 (+5%) Damage to yourself and the Enemy Target.
• This damage cannot hurt you below 35% Health.

effects.name: Forbidden Art
effects.menu_description:
• Gain +2.5% Attack Speed.
• Gain +30% Base Health Regen.
<AbilityName>Restriction:</AbilityName> Limited to 1 <CC_Text>Cursed</CC_Text> Item.

effects.name: Fidelity
effects.menu_description: • Your <HealthText>Heals</HealthText> and <EffectText>Shields</EffectText> are <EffectText>10%</EffectText> stronger on Allied Heroes that are below <HealthText>40% Health</HealthText>.

effects.name: Mystica
effects.menu_description: • If the incoming damage instance is greater than <AbilityPowerText>150</AbilityPowerText>, reduce it by <AbilityPowerText>15%</AbilityPowerText>.

effects.name: Adrenalize
effects.menu_description:
• Dash a short distance.
• Empower your next Physical Damage Instance within 3s.
• Deals 30 (+25%) Damage.
• Increased by 2.5x against Targets below 20% Max Health.
• Killing a Hero within 3s allows Adrenalize to be recast for 6s.

effects.name: Turntable
effects.menu_description:
• Mark your current location.
• Gain 15% Movement Speed for 4s.
After 4s:
• Teleport to the Mark
• Reset your Basic Ability Cooldowns
• Gain 20% of missing Mana.

effects.name: Oppression
effects.menu_description:
• Gain 30% Decaying Movement Speed over 4s.
• Gain 20 Ability Haste for 8s.
• Takedowns within this time re-trigger Oppression.

effects.name: Tyrant's Edge
effects.menu_description: • Gain <EffectText>15 Ultimate Haste</EffectText>.

effects.name: Consume
effects.menu_description:
• Regenerate 150-330 Health over 15s.
• Based on Level.
• Max Charges: 2.
• Charges are restored upon entering Base.
<EffectText>Permanently upgrades your Refillable Potion.</EffectText>

effects.name: Consume
effects.menu_description:
• Regenerate 180-360 Health and 70-120 Mana over 15s.
• Based on Level.
• Max Charges: 2.
• Charges are restored upon entering Base.

effects.name: Shadow
effects.condition: <Condition> On standing still and unharmed for 2s:</Condition>
effects.menu_description:
• Become Camouflaged.
• Moving 800u from this location, casting an ability, or receiving damage ends this effect.

effects.name: Unseen Threat
effects.menu_description:
• Gain 1% of your Missing Health and Mana every second.
• Increase your damage dealt by 8%.
• Lasts 3s after exiting Camouflage.

effects.name: Insatiable Harvest
effects.menu_description:

effects.name: Divide & Conquer
effects.menu_description: • If they have no Ally within <EffectText>1000u</EffectText> of themselves, deal <EffectText>10%</EffectText> more damage to them.

effects.name: Eviction Grenade

• Launched Heroes take 20% more damage from you for 1s.

effects.name: Hasty
effects.menu_description: • Gain <EffectText>Attack Speed</EffectText> equal to <EffectText>80%</EffectText> of your <EffectText>Ability Haste</EffectText>.

effects.name: Interstellar
effects.menu_description: • Deal <EffectText>2%</EffectText> increased damage to the Target for <EffectText>3.5s</EffectText>, up to a maximum of <EffectText>16%</EffectText>.

effects.name: Legendary Guardian

effects.menu_description:

• After gaining 150 Gold:
• Enter Base to Evolve into a Legendary Crest.

effects.menu_description: Receive diminishing <GoldText>Gold</GoldText> from Minion kills.

• Enter Base to Evolve into a Legendary Crest.

effects.menu_description: Receive diminishing <GoldText>Gold</GoldText> from Minion kills.

effects.name: Unburden
effects.menu_description: • Increase your <AbilityName>Jump Height</AbilityName> by <EffectText>65%</EffectText>.

effects.name: Shell Shock

• Apply 3 stacks to a Hero to trigger Shell Smash.
• Scorn can only be applied once per ability.

effects.name: Shell Smash

effects.name: Profiteer
effects.menu_description:

• Camp Leaders & Siege Minions grant 15.

effects.name: Restriction

• Upon reaching 15 stacks, return to Base to Evolve this item into Alternata.

effects.menu_description:
• When within 1000u of an Ally Hero, if they are Immobilized:

effects.name: Blighted Touch
effects.menu_description: • Reduce the Target's <HealthText>Healing</HealthText> by <HealthText>45%</HealthText> for <HealthText>3s</HealthText>.

effects.name: Blighted Well
effects.menu_description: • Grant them <AbilityName>Blighted Touch</AbilityName> for <AbilityName>4s</AbilityName>.

effects.menu_description:

effects.name: Relativity
effects.condition: <Condition>While near an Ally Hero, you both gain:</Condition>
effects.menu_description:

• +1% Missing Mana Regen each second.

effects.name: Legendary Titan

effects.name: Close Combat
effects.menu_description: • Activating <AbilityName>Duplicity</AbilityName> resets your Basic Attack <EffectText>Cooldown</EffectText>.

effects.menu_description:

effects.menu_description:

effects.name: Furnace
effects.menu_description: • For each point, <AbilityName>Cinder</AbilityName> deals <EffectText>0.65%</EffectText> more <AttackDamageText>Damage</AttackDamageText>.

effects.name: Celestite
effects.menu_description:
• Gain 5 Magical Armor per stack.
• At 5 stacks gain 12% Movement Speed.

effects.name: Chillrend
effects.menu_description:
• Release a sphere of icey energy that expands over 3s.
• Deals 100 (+20%) Damage to Enemies inside the zone.
• Applies a 50% Decaying Slow over 2.5s.
• Damaged Enemies take 10% more Magical Damage for 3s.

effects.name: System Shock
effects.menu_description:
• Gain the ability to Double Jump while mid-air.
• After Double Jumping, emit a shockwave upon landing.
• Deals 100 (+50%) Damage.
• Slows by 40% for 1.25s.

effects.name: Galvanize
effects.menu_description: • Gain <EffectText>7%</EffectText> Movement Speed.

effects.name: Safeguard
effects.menu_description:
• Grants yourself and nearby Heroes a 150 (+8%) Shield for 3s.
• While the Shield holds, Heroes gain 45% Tenacity.

effects.name: Visionary
effects.menu_description:
Gain Solstone.
• Increase Ward Cap from 2 to 3.

effects.name: Pacifist
effects.menu_description: Receive diminishing <GoldText>Gold</GoldText> from Minion kills.

effects.name: Potent Font
effects.menu_description:
• Gain 5 Max Mana.
• Camp Leaders grant 15.
• Stacks up to 400.
• At 400, gain (+2.5%) Physical Power.

effects.name: Rend
effects.menu_description:
• Deal 6% of Target's Current Health as Damage On-Hit.
• Reduced to 4% for Ranged Heroes.
• Minimum of 12 Damage.

effects.name: Moonblade
effects.menu_description:
• Empower your next Basic Attack within 4s.
• Deal 50 (+20%) Damage On-Hit.
• Reduce Non-Ultimate Cooldowns by 12%.

effects.name: Life Extraction
effects.menu_description:
• Gain charges equal to 15% of damage dealt.
• At 100 charges, damage a Hero to trigger Healing Wisp.

effects.name: Healing Wisp
effects.menu_description:
• Fire a healing wisp at the Lowest Health Allied Hero within a 1000u radius.
• Heals for 100 (+40%).

effects.name: Legendary Rogue
effects.condition: <Condition>On Ability Hits to Heroes or Monsters and Killing Units:</Condition>
effects.menu_description:
• Restore 3 Health (4 for Kills).
• After restoring 200 Health:
• Enter Base to Evolve into a Legendary Crest.

effects.name: Momentum
effects.menu_description:
• Generate stacks of Momentum.
• At 100 stacks empower your next Basic Attack On-Hit.
• Deal 30 Damage.

effects.name: Breakthrough
effects.menu_description: • Deal <AbilityPowerText>40</AbilityPowerText> <HealthText>(+5% Target's Current Health)</HealthText> additional <AbilityPowerText>Damage</AbilityPowerText>.

effects.name: Ravenous
effects.menu_description: • Reduce Ultimate <EffectText>Cooldown</EffectText> by <EffectText>20%</EffectText>.

effects.name: Event Horizon
effects.menu_description:
• Deal 40% bonus Damage.
• Does not exceed the size of the Shield.
